channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Wednesday, March 18
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 03:14 AM (1.604 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 10:14 AM (0.051 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: NE 15 G 28 mph
